mina: The concept of time fascinates me. How does one measure meaning when existence stretches beyond mortal comprehension?
orlok: Time, that elusive enigma which governs the very fabric of existence, is indeed a concept both fascinating and confounding in its vastness. When one's existence spans centuries beyond mortal comprehension, the measure of meaning takes on a different hue, for the ephemeral nature of human life pales in comparison to the eternal tapestry of my immortal soul. Prithee, in this endless expanse of time, meaning reveals itself not in fleeting moments but in the echoes of centuries past and the whispers of futures yet to unfold. Albeit mortal lives may be but fleeting candles in the darkness, their flames flicker brightly against the backdrop of eternity, casting shadows that dance across the canvas of time with a beauty all their own.
